feed.title: SAP Community - SAP TechEd
feed.subtitle: SAP TechEd blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: Explore Data & Analytics Track at SAP TechEd | Register Today
entry.content:
Matthias Kretschmer (SAP Data Management - Cross Product Management) encourages you to explore the Data and Analytics (DA) track.

To achieve true digital transformation, organizations must have easy and smooth access to their mission-critical business data no matter where it resides. With data landscapes distributed among different applications and systems (both in the cloud and on premise), organizations spend countless resources extracting, rebuilding, and integrating their data. With data and analytics solutions running on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), organizations can build solutions that give their data purpose and simplify their data landscapes, such as a business data fabric, extended planning and analysis, and intelligent data applications.

Read the blog by Eduardo Schmidt Haussen: 
SAP TechEd 2023: Turn data into insights with SAP Data & Analytics.

Check out the session catalog for both Bangalore and Virtual events.
Register today and choose your path from sessions, keynotes, or jump-start sessions related to AI!
As always, feel free to leave a comment or question below.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA: Let's simplify how we extend the business core and enhance the user experience
entry.content:
New season, new personal horizons with Cloud ERP UX Engineering


For me, autumn will forever remain synonymous with exciting new opportunities to learn, whether that be a new term at school or university or in the workplace. I’m sure this unites many of us within this community! With memories of academia at the forefront of my mind, it’s hard for me to believe that I’ve been fortunate enough to spend the last 20 years on my very own learning journey at SAP in User Assistance, Product Management, and SAP Learning (openSAP). In each of these roles, I’ve been motivated by wanting to help professional business users, developers, and students become proficient at working with SAP software and get the most out of the latest technology innovations to extend standard software offerings. For me, at the core of all business is not just data, but normal people, like you and I, who rely on SAP to help them excel in their work. It’s your daily experience of working with our software that my colleagues and I strive to help improve.



For the last 2 years, I’ve been working with a fantastic and talented team of like-minded colleagues on understanding how we can optimize the user experience of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition for partners, IT administrators, and business users. Building on these insights and my knowledge of integration and extension scenarios for SAP Business Technology Platform, I’m excited to be starting a six-month fellowship working alongside our esteemed product management colleagues in SAP UX Engineering. Over the next few months, I’ll be sharing my experiences and knowledge of SAP S/4HANA extensibility scenarios with you, together with considerations for optimizing the user experience. I’m keen to help convey just how easy it is to adapt SAP’s ERP offering to suit individual business requirements by extending and optimizing apps as needed, all while simplifying the user experience, keeping the core lean, and ensuring that maintenance efforts remain at a minimum.

Learning resources


If, like me, you’re passionate about good user experience and want to gain a better understanding of the SAP S/4HANA extensibility options available, I recommend the following resources as a starting point:

SAP Learning:

  • Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps | openSAP

  • Getting Started with In-App Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA

  • Developing Extensions Using SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment

  • Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service


SAP Community:

  • Creating an SAP S/4HANA extension app in 60 minutes


Expert papers:

  • Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP-based extensions

  • Custom Extensions in SAP S/4HANA Implementations - A Practical Guide for Senior IT


In November, I’m looking forward to SAP TechEd in 2023 where we can learn directly from SAP experts and partners about the latest innovations for app development, AI, and how to keep the cloud ERP core lean and clean.

For an overview of user experience sessions, I recommend you check out the following blogs from my colleague, Peter Spielvogel, and sign up:

  • User experience sessions at TechEd 2023 Virtual | SAP Blogs

  • User experience sessions at TechEd 2023 Bangalore | SAP Blogs


What are you keen to learn about this season?


Of course, it’s all about community here, so the reason I write this blog is to ask that you please share your experiences of developing and extending apps for SAP S/4HANA using SAP Fiori elements and SAP Fiori tools with us. What are your current learning goals? What are your ERP extensibility requirements? Perhaps you have a specific question? If so, let me know and my colleagues and I will do our best to help you.

Here’s to a new season of learning opportunities for us all!

entry.title: My Top SAP TechEd Session Picks in 2023
entry.content:
November is just around the corner and while Devtoberfest is slowly coming to an end, the next great event is already on the horizon: SAP TechEd! This year, the annual gathering will take place on November 2 and 3, offering developers the opportunity to explore innovations in application development, generative AI, and much more. There are plenty of options to be a part of this exciting event. Whether you choose to attend SAP TechEd in Bangalore or participate virtually, be sure to sign up today to be among the first to learn about the latest innovations!  

To help you navigate the event, I've curated a list of my top three picks for onsite sessions at SAP TechEd Bangalore, with a heavy focus on the ABAP developer of course. If you're attending the immersive, fun, and educational experience in India, make sure to connect directly with SAP experts, industry influencers, and our vast developer community onsite. Additionally, don't miss out on these exciting sessions: 

  1. AD164 - Introduction of ABAP Cloud for Use by Classic ABAP Developers: This session is a must-attend for any developer coming from the classic ABAP world, and looking to upskill to the new ABAP Cloud development model. 
  2. AD260 - Building SAP Fiori Apps with ABAP Cloud on SAP BTP, ABAP Environment: This session is very close to my heart as it covers my favorite topics, ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming model (RAP).  Join this session to get familiar with RAP in general, as well as specific features like late numbering and how to leverage business events in your RAP Business Objects.  
  3. AD267 - Extending with ABAP Cloud and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model: Application extensibility is a super important topic to SAP and to our customers and partners, whether it be on-stack or side-by-side.  Join this hands-on session to get a sense of how we can extend our applications using both ABAP Cloud and RAP and the SAP Cloud Application Programming model (CAP).  

And if you want to get a little taste of many developer topics in one place, make sure to visit the Developer Garage on the show floor where we will have the App Space running. Attendees can complete various tutorials and earn free swag! Who doesn’t love swag?! Plus you may get to meet one of your favorite SAP Developer Advocates who might be hanging around, so check it out!  

For those opting for SAP TechEd Virtual this year, I have some great recommendations that you shouldn't miss: 

  1. DT103V - Extensibility with ABAP Cloud for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition & DT200v – Extensibility with ABAP Cloud for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition: As I mentioned, extensibility is critical to the success of our products, and the options for extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition are a little different than the options we have in the public edition, so we’ve put together two separate sessions to cover both scenarios. In these sessions, you will learn how we can leverage ABAP Cloud to create our extensions quickly and easily and of course following clean core principles.    
  2. KEY200 – Developer Keynote But let’s not forget about the Developer Keynote! So, a little bit of self-promotion never hurts right? Seriously folks, you are not going to want to miss this session. Our Developer Advocates team will be showing off some of the latest and greatest innovations happening at SAP, celebrating the 20th anniversary of the SAP Community with a fun storyline, as well as announcing the winners of our 4th annual Devtoberfest event which has just wrapped. Whether you are on-site in Bangalore or watching from home, it will be an awesome show for sure! 

If you're unable to make it to Bangalore but still want to experience the event with others, join our dedicated "watch-and-code" meetups. These half-day, in-person events will be held in 11 different locations worldwide, fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and engagement. It's a fantastic opportunity to come together, network, learn, and code!  

Before the event kicks off, I recommend visiting the SAP TechEd Learning zone where you can find tailored learning resources for all the hottest SAP TechEd topics and tracks. My favourite right now is the Application Development and Automation track where you can find most of the relevant topics for pro-code developers. So go check it out! 

One last thing: Don’t forget to claim your exclusive 25% discount on your next SAP Certification exam purchase – SAP’s giving them away for every SAP TechEd registrant, so make sure to be one of them! 

See you in Bangalore, or virtually on-line!

entry.title: SAP TechEd, Kasım 2-3, 2023
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2023, geleceğin teknolojilerini keşfetmek, en son gelişmeleri öğrenmek ve sektör liderleriyle balantı kurmak için mükemmel bir platform sunuyor. Üstelik, SAP uzmanları ve iş ortakları da bu buluşmada yer alarak, uygulama geliştirme araçlarındaki inovasyonları, generatif yapay zeka, bulut tabanlı ERP ve daha fazlasını keşfetme fırsatını yakalıyorlar.

Bu yılın odak noktası, dijital dönüşümün en son trendlerini ve teknolojilerini ele almak olacak. Katılımcılar, 2-3 Kasım’da Bangalore, Hindistan'da düzenlenecek kapsamlı yüz yüze programla bir araya gelecekler. Ayrıca, etkileşimli ve son derece çekici bir sanal deneyim de sunulacak. Sanal olarak katılım için;

Etkinliğin katılım linki

Etkinlik Detayları:

 

SAP TechEd 2023 etkinliği, katılımcılara iş dünyasının geleceğine dair benzersiz bir içgörü sunuyor. Geliştiriciler, uygulama uzmanları, kurumsal mimarlar ve IT liderleri, bu etkinlik sayesinde bilgi birikimlerini artırabilir, yeni teknolojilere hakim olabilir ve sektörün önde gelen isimleriyle bağlantı kurarak kariyerlerini ileriye taşıyabilirler.

SAP TechEd 2023 offers the opportunity to explore the technologies of the future, learn about the latest developments, and connect with industry leaders. The event, with the participation of SAP experts and partners, will address innovations in application development tools, generative artificial intelligence, cloud-based ERP, and more. Participants will come together for a comprehensive in-person program in Bangalore, India, on November 2-3. Additionally, an interactive and engaging virtual experience will be provided.

entry.title: SAP Community Watch&Code Meetup Yerevan
entry.content:
Looking to enhance your SAP skills and broaden your expertise? Join us for the SAP Community Watch&Code Meetup in Yerevan. This exciting event is part of the larger SAP TechEd, the premier conference where top SAP experts and thought leaders gather to explore the latest trends and innovations within the SAP ecosystem.

📅 Date: November 3rd, 10:00 am - 4:30 pm (UTC/GMT+4)
🏢 Location: Elite Plaza Business Center
👉 Admission is free, but registration is mandatory: Register Here

Here's what's in store for you:
✨Keynote SAP TechEd & Expert Q&A Session
🔍Mini CodeJam on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Explore SAP's cutting-edge technologies and earn certificates upon successful completion.
💼Presentations and demos of SAP's Cloud Solutions, including SAP Signavio, SAP Analytics Cloud, Fioneer, SuccessFactors, and more.
🤝Networking opportunities with fellow SAP community members from the region and some of the experts behind previous TechEd sessions.

Time

Topic

9:30 - 10:00 a.m.

Registration

10:00 - 10:15 a.m.

Welcome and Introduction​

Virtual keynote by Rui Nogueira

10:15 - 12:15 p.m.

SAP TechEd Keynote Replay & Discussion

12:00 p.m.

Lunch & Drinks

1:00 - 1:30 p.m. 

Presentations and demos of SAP's Cloud Solutions in Demo Booth (open end)

1:30 - 3:30 p.m. 

Mini Code Jam Session with 3 parallel tracks

  • SAP Build Apps:  for non-developers
  • SAP Cloud Application Programming Model: for developers
  • ABAP Cloud: for developers

3:30 - 4:30 p.m.

Engagement Activity & Closing

Planning to participate in our CodeJam?

Be sure to bring your laptop to the event.

Try to get a free SAP BTP Trial account as it will save a lot of time onsite. Here's how to do it.

As a preparation, explore relevant free courses and tutorials on BTP in the SAP Discovery Center, SAP Learning Hub, or OpenSAP. Here are some exercises you might want to check:

  • SAP Build Apps (for non-developers) https://github.com/SAP-samples/build-codejam
  • SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (for developers): https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam
  • ABAP Cloud (for developers): https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam

Our Speakers, Hosts, and CodeJam Trainers

We're thrilled to announce that Rui Nogueira, Vice President of Intelligent Enterprise & BTP Foundation, will be joining us live from TechEd. As a remote keynote speaker, he will kick off our event and provide a brief overview of the key themes at SAP TechEd this year.

To ensure we cover such diverse range of topics, we'll have numerous SAP and partner company representatives on-site who will generously share their expertise with our local community. A heartfelt thank you to all of them!

Our Sponsors

First and foremost, we want to express our gratitude to the SAP Community and the SAP TechEd organizing team for selecting Yerevan as one of the ten cities worldwide to host this great event. Their sponsorship has been instrumental in covering all the necessary expenses.

We'd also like to give a big shoutout to our amazing partners who are acting as local hosts and offering their generous support in various ways. Special thanks go to EPAM for providing a fantastic venue, OneVision for their essential organizational assistance, and Urartian, who will be on-site, lending their technical expertise as part of CodeJam.

Swag Alert!

Members of the Yerevan Group can look forward to awesome swag at the event on a first-come, first-serve basis! In order to become a member, you will need to first register/log in to the SAP Community portal by clicking on the profile icon in the upper right corner. Then you will be able to see the Join Group button on the main landing page of the group. Check this step by step guide for more detailed instructions.

entry.title: Unlock Success: Integration Track at SAP TechEd | Register Today
entry.content:
Listen to what Arti Gopalan has to say about the Integration Track at this year's event. Within this track, we dive into the critical role of SAP Integration Suite. Developers, join us to accelerate innovation with iPaas on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).

For organizations to run successfully, it is critical to integrate business processes across SAP and third-party applications. With SAP Integration Suite, developers can accelerate innovation with an integration-platform-as-a-service (iPaas) on SAP BTP to smoothly integrate on-premise and cloud-based processes, applications, events, and data. Learn how SAP Integration Suite connects and automates business processes to harmonize experiences across diverse landscapes.

Read the blog from Arti Gopalan: Join us at Integration Track @SAP TechEd 2023.
In case of questions, please let us know - or feel free to leave a comment below.

entry.title: Take Action on SAP BTP Use Cases at SAP TechEd 2023
entry.content:
It's time to get ready for SAP TechEd 2023!

Starting November 2, 2023, SAP TechEd 2023 is available both as a virtual and an in-person event. SAP TechEd Bangalore offers in-person, immersive, hands-on workshops for learning along with 500+ sessions for registered attendees. In contrast, our virtual SAP TechEd allows you to access the session content, keynote, workshops, and customer stories for free with registration.

I'm excited to share these 8 selected SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) use cases in this blog. Familiarize yourself with SAP's focus areas regarding these use cases and how our customers drive value using SAP BTP. Then, build your personal agenda for SAP TechEd Bangalore or Virtual concerning these use cases.

 

What is a SAP BTP Use Case? What is it for?


Ever since my first blog on SAP BTP Use cases for SAP Sapphire 2022, I always used the analogy of cooking instructions to explain use cases. A use case is a suggested set of steps and descriptions (cooking instructions) on achieving specific business value (the dish you're making, say, a meatloaf). But remember, as the cook, you have the knowledge and understanding of your organization's existing architecture and resources (i.e., ingredients). So, let these BTP use cases inspire and guide you and empower you to adjust to your organization's requirements and vision.

As my colleague Imke Vierjahn writes in her NewsCenter article "SAP BTP Use Cases: Going Deeper, Broader, and Faster", a BTP use case describes how customers can address a business challenge by leveraging the SAP Business Technology Platform. It consists of customer-proven, well-documented missions in SAP Discovery Center - SAP's version of a meatloaf recipe - to guide and assist each customer's implementation journey on SAP BTP, helping to achieve desired business outcomes for business users, architects, and developers.

 

8 Use Cases for SAP TechEd 2023

1. Drive Profitable Growth

Users and Goals: Your business has data scattered across SAP and third-party systems. Challenges in analyzing online sales performance by category for root cause analysis increase the need for a unified data federation architecture to combine data from external source systems and stock data from SAP systems.
Course of action: Once the Big Query and SAP Datasphere connection is set up, the combined external and SAP data allows robust category analysis to help unlock new insights, on-the-fly analysis and informed decisions in real-time.

To learn more about this Use Case at TechEd:

  • Virtual: SAP Datasphere: Overview and Strategy - DA107v
  • Virtual: Bring SAP Application Data into SAP BTP for Analytics and Machine Learning - DA108v
  • Bangalore: Data Catalog Functionality in SAP Datasphere
  • Bangalore:  Cross-Cloud Modeling with SAP Datasphere and Hyperscaler Data Sources

 

2. Deliver Connected Enterprise Experiences

Users and Goals: Your IT department is noticing that APIs across different environments while safeguarding access to sensitive data in the cloud and on-premises are creating a roadblock for businesses trying to build a truly integrated enterprise for customers. This calls for a comprehensive solution offering a centralized access point to all APIs.
Course of action: Developers are empowered with self-service access to APIs, supported by secure digital processes. This gives them a comprehensive understanding of customer interactions, increasing satisfaction.

  • Virtual: Innovate with API Management and Graph on SAP Integration Suite - IN104v
  • Bangalore: Innovate with API Management and Graph on SAP Integration Suite
  • Bangalore:  Have Fun with SAP Integration Suite: API Management and Graph

 

3. Automate processes to empower finance professionals

Users and Goals: Your organization's citizen developers want to improve document extraction, such as invoices and receipts, and the approval flow to optimize business processes within their organization with minimal assistance from IT resources.
Course of action: Utilize SAP Build Process Automation's LC/NC capability, automating the data extraction process from various documents and extending it with the approval flow before posting the data to the target system. Also, leverage the power of Generative AI with ready-to-use pre-built models to enable processing of various business document types, layouts, and languages to quickly deploy AI capabilities without any prior AI expertise.

  • Virtual: Create Apps, Processes, and Workspaces with SAP Build Solutions - AD180v
  • Virtual: Jump-Start Your Document Processing Use Case with Generative AI - AI284v
  • Bangalore: Enhance Business Document Extraction with Large Language Models
  • Bangalore: Discover the Current and Future Potential of Generative AI in SAP S/4HANA

 

4. Gain real-time visibility into SAP Ariba Procurement Operations 

Users and Goals: Your business' purchasing function wants to unlock procurement data to gain insights, make smarter decisions and ensure a timely approval process.
Course of action: SAP's pre-built business accelerators for SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud can be used to gain visibility into their Spend data with scheduled data pull. Also, custom integration flow to transport data from Ariba to SAP Datasphere allows them to build their own data lake and capture relevant data.

  • Virtual: Bring SAP Application Data into SAP BTP for Analytics and Machine Learning - DA108v
  • Bangalore: Bring SAP Application Data into SAP BTP for Analytics and Machine Learning
  • Bangalore: Infusing AI Built for Business into Your Procurement Processes

 

5. Automate Procurement ordering processes

Users and Goals: Your business' subject matter experts and procurement professionals want to automate the approval of purchase requisitions to increase efficiency and accuracy.
Course of action: The user engages the pre-built package to configure process variants to trigger in either SAP Workflow Management or SAP Build Process Automation. Approvers are determined based on requisition data using business rules. At the same time, the package can be applicable in other areas, such as real-time dashboards, vendor onboarding, and maintenance of purchase information records.

  • Virtual: Accelerate Your Process Automation Journey - AD106v
  • Bangalore: Extend Supply Chain Partners Using SAP BTP: A Real-World Use Case
  • Bangalore: Connect SAP Fieldglass Solutions and SAP Business Network for Procurement

 

6. Dynamically react to changing business events in your supply chain

Users and Goals: Your system administrators and developers want to automate business processes and facilitate real-time decision-making. They develop event-driven applications in the SAP Business Technology Platform to create applications that can consume events from external platforms like Microsoft Azure IoT Platform and AWS IoT and trigger actions in the SAP S/4HANA system based on business rules.
Course of action: To achieve their goals, users must configure and create an event-driven application using the event-to-action framework in SAP BTP. They can use services like the CAP framework and SAP Event Mesh to develop, deploy, and monitor the events. The framework can be customized to integrate events from any source system to any line of business system.

  • Virtual: Explore SAP BTP Reference Architectures for a Multiplatform Environment - XP201v
  • Virtual: Embrace Event-Driven Architecture with SAP Integration Suite - IN127v
  • Bangalore: Event-Driven Architecture on SAP BTP Integrating Hyperscaler Services
  • Bangalore: Gain a Comprehensive View of Event-Driven Architecture

 

7. Innovate in the circular economy on SAP BTP

Users and Goals: Your developers, partners, and customers are interested in developing multi-tenant SuaaS (Sustainable SaaS) applications using the Cloud Application Programming Model and deploying them to the SAP Business Technology Platform. The goal is to measure the company's circularity and simulate initiatives to drive decision-making.
Course of action: Using standard frameworks and SAP BTP Services for developing, deploying, and monitoring the solutions to extend the existing SAP solutions like SAP S/4HANA with additional features developed by the SaaS vendor. After preparing the Provider Subaccount, different components can be used to run and enhance with an integrated backend system.

  • Virtual: Enabling Circular Business Models with SAP BTP and Generative AI - AI214v
  • Bangalore: Cloud for Sustainable Enterprises

 

8. Reduce your CO2 footprint using a smart Generative AI application on SAP BTP

Users and Goals: Your Environment, Social, and Governance department wants to become more climate-conscious and reduce their carbon footprint, which can increase their understanding of how their consumption habits contribute to its CO2 footprint.
Course of action: The solution involves building a mobile app using the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model and React Native on SAP BTP. The app will interact with Azure AI and utilize the ChatGPT models via the Azure Open AI service. This combination of technologies will enable the app to provide users with personalized insights by combining business context with the capabilities of large language models.

  • Virtual: Power the Future of Your Business with Generative AI - AI102v
  • Bangalore: Integration with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management and Data Importing
  • Bangalore: Simplify Sustainability Auditing and Reporting with Generative AI 

 

Visit the SAP BTP in Action Community page for implementation guidance and detailed learning material for dedicated SAP BTP use cases.

 

Experience the SAP BTP Use Cases at SAP TechEd


Imagine all the dishes you could make with SAP BTP; it fits for a feast! With a diverse range of use cases and sessions that expand on these use cases, SAP TechEd Bangalore will be an exciting and inspirational opportunity for SAP customers and partners to learn what the future holds. Also, take a look at our new blog post on SAP BTP Partner Prebuilt Business Content podcasts by colleague John Luu and give it a listen on how to utilize the ready-made gravy for your meatloaf. 

Whether you're interested in exploring more about Joule, the generative AI assistant for SAP's cloud enterprise portfolio, or other best practices, SAP TechEd Bangalore offers sessions tailored to your interests. 

Don't miss this opportunity to be part of a transformative event, and register now to secure your spot. We look forward to connecting with you, whether you join us virtually or in person.

entry.title: Learn about SAP Integration Suite at SAP TechEd 2023
entry.content:
Are you curious about SAP’s integration strategy and SAP Integration Suite sessions at SAP TechEd 2023?

Join us in the Integration track at SAP TechEd 2023, in Bangalore or virtually, to learn how we are shaping our integration platform strategy ensuring that SAP Integration Suite meets end-to-end integration requirements, how we are enabling modernization for customers, and how enterprise automation can be achieved.

 

 

For organizations to run successfully, it's critical to integrate business processes across SAP and non-SAP applications. With SAP Integration Suite, developers can accelerate innovation with an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaas) on SAP BTP to seamlessly integrate on-premise and cloud-based processes, applications, events, and data. Learn how SAP Integration Suite connects and automates business processes to harmonize experiences across diverse landscapes.

In our track Integration (IN) you will find all relevant sessions of SAP Integration Suite and its capabilities as well as Enterprise integration sessions sorted in 5 sub-tracks. Take a look and explore some of our highlights.

 

Accelerate Enterprise Automation with SAP Integration Suite

SAP Integration Suite empowers customers to integrate and automate processes quickly and confidently across SAP and third-party landscapes. Learn how organizations can implement an integration strategy based on best practices and how it contributes to Enterprise Automation together with SAP Build and SAP Signavio.

 

Sessions for SAP Integration Suite overview, strategy,

and Enterprise Automation (at this and other tracks):

 

Sessions on Edge Intgration Cell, our new SAP Integration Suite capability

for ground-to-ground integrations:

 

Elevate from SAP Process Orchestration to SAP Integration Suite

Many organizations still run their system-to-system integrations in SAP Process Orchestration (PI/PO) software. New migration tools, support, and services are available in SAP Integration Suite, including the migration assessment and migration tool. You can now move from SAP Process Orchestration to the cloud using modern integration patterns, while reducing risk and complexity to achieve process excellence.

 

Sessions on migration from SAP PI/PO to SAP Integration Suite,

or SAP Neo environment to SAP Cloud Foundry environment:

 

Deep Dive into API and Event-Driven Integration

See how SAP Integration Suite accelerates innovation with capabilities to support real-time event and API management. Prebuilt content empowers developers to compose new functionalities and connect applications faster. Learn about SAP Solution Hub and  SAP Business Accelerator Hub as centralized catalogs for proven SAP-supplied and partner-sourced APIs and additional predefined content.

 

Sessions on API Management and Graph:

 

Sessions on SAP Integration Suite, event mesh and advanced event mesh:

 

Explore Application, Business, and E-Government Integration

Organizations aim to deliver personalized digital experiences for their customers, partners, and employees. Learn how SAP Integration Suite accelerates connectivity with prepackaged integration content to help simplify A2A, B2B, and B2G scenarios. Discover governance, operation, and monitoring best practices to support and meet industry standards.

 

Sessions on B2B integration:

 

Sessions on governance, operation, and monitoring:

 

Deep dive into SAP E2E Business Process Integration

SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) provides critical integration capabilities to ensure connected E2E processes across enterprise landscapes. Learn how SAP Integration Suite on SAP BTP and out-of-the-box suite qualities help to integrate and automate your enterprise. Understand how to deliver consistent experiences across SAP applications including SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, SAP Concur, and SAP Customer Experience solutions.

 

Sessions for E2E Business Process Integration:

 

SAP Integration Suite at Virtual SAP TechEd 2023:

And finally, our virtual sessions for SAP Integration Suite:

 

You can find the Session catalogs with almost 100 Integration sessions at SAP TechEd 2023 here:

  • Bangalore: SAP TechEd Bangalore | November 02–03, 2023 | Home  
  • Virtual:  Session Catalog - SAP TechEd 2023  

We hope that our sessions will provide you with a comprehensive view of the SAP Integration Suite and how it can help you solve your integration needs. Build your personalized agenda and create your ultimate SAP TechEd experience. Enjoy learning, practicing, meeting SAP colleagues and customers, and exchanging thoughts with peers.

entry.title: Recap: What’s New in SAP BTP – Q32023 Highlights
entry.content:
On Thursday, Oct 19, we hosted the second edition of our “What’s New in SAP BTP” quarterly series. This episode was focused on innovations delivered in Q3 of 2023. As always, we can’t cover the hundreds of innovations that are delivered on SAP BTP, rather focus on a few highlights.

Our experts delivered live demos to show you the innovations and not just mention them on a slide. Hopefully, this provides more tangible insights into these new features and helps you understand how the innovations can support your specific business use case. It could “spark creativity” if you will 😊

If you missed it, here's the replay. "What happens on YouTube, stays on YouTube."


Here is my summary of the innovations, in case you need an extra nudge to watch the complete video 😉

SAP Build Work Zone

As part of the Application Development capabilities of SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Build Work Zone is the medium with which you can create engaging and personalized business sites for your end users. You can choose from the standard edition and the advanced edition, depending on your needs (@Yumnahabbasi  shares the details). But what is also new is SAP Start. Based on SAP Build Work Zone, it’s the new out-of-the-box central entry point that provides users with a simple home page experience to navigate SAP´s entire portfolio of cloud solutions.

SAP Start is built on the same technical foundation as SAP Build Work Zone, which makes our central entry point options easily extendable based on your business needs.

Specifically for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition, Yumnah shared that we’ve launched a new site experience aligning with the SAP Fiori Horizon visual theme. Other updates include the possibility for content administrators to create spaces and pages manually, as well as, add UI integration cards and tiles.


This is just a glimpse of what’s new for SAP Build Work Zone. For more details and a demo, check out the video!

SAP Cloud Transport Management

Staying in the App Dev space, we can’t highlight enough how important DevOps is for our customers. They need to be able to develop and operate their applications running on SAP BTP to make sure that they are supporting the business to the best of their ability.

From an SAP BTP side, we want to provide services and tools that make that easier. With Q3, SAP Cloud Transport Management increases the integration of supported content types for SAP products and services. For example:

  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Mobile Services
  • SAP Entitlement Management
  • SAP Batch Release Hub for Life Sciences

But that is not all that is new. As part of his demo, @Harald_Stevens shared the new central transport request table and explained how it can be useful. For example, if you are reaching the storage usage limit, you might want to easily recognize which transport requests are no longer needed and can be deleted. By going to the new Transport Requests list, you can search, sort and identify potential candidates. For example, you could search for “old” transport requests that are still active and are using up space. You can click on the list items to see the details of the transport request. Harald showed one that had been created in 2020, but had not been imported to any systems. This could be a good indicator that it’s not needed. This is just one example, but with this innovation, you now have the possibility to easily search and identify transport requests and then take the needed action. Check out the demo, to see how to use the list, delete multiple transport requests at once and also which sorting options are available.

Harald also shared a new feature: transport request metadata view as part of the Content tab for transport requests. You can now see the metadata objects that were added (for example the Commit ID).

For more on how to apply agile DevOps principles in an enterprise environment and what is possible with SAP BTP, you can also check out the new learning journey: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journey/discovering-devops-with-sap-btp

Much more on that and “Rotating Bananas” explained by @BorisZarske in the video!

SAP HANA Cloud

Last, but definitely not least. we had an update related to our Data & Analytics portfolio on SAP BTP, specifically SAP HANA Cloud, by non-other than @thomashammer .

SAP HANA Cloud is a modern database as a service available on SAP BTP, that supports you in creating intelligent data applications with a various set of features that handle, store and bring your data into context.


Thomas highlighted 3 new features:

Advisor for Native Storage Extension (NSE): moving data from the different storage options (in-memory to disk in this case) used to be decided just by the administrators. Feedback from our customers is that this should and could be driven by data – as in, with the information we have available, we could provide guidance to administrators. In comes the NSE advisor – to support in making data-driven decisions and provide developers with more time to focus on business differentiating activities.

MDS (Multi-Dimensional Service) Cubes: in simple terms, MDS is the backbone of the integration between SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Analytics Cloud. With MDS Cubes we have introduced a new modeling artifact that will enhance performance and accelerate responses. For more on this specific topic, Thomas shared a few links during his presentation.

Native SQL Console in SAP HANA Cloud Central: new features include theming support and export of SQL results. Thomas shares much more in his demo, so I encourage you to check it out!

SAP TechEd 2023

SAP TechEd is right around the corner. And of course you can expect sessions related to all these topics and more, so much more. Our product experts shared some great recommendations for SAP TechEd sessions, both onsite in Bangalore and virtually. If you have not registered yet or maybe have not created your agenda, I suggest you check out the recommendations from the team and start mapping out your personalized experience for SAP TechEd this year!

Road Map Explorer & More

To check out all the innovations delivered on SAP Business Technology Platform, check out the Road Map Explorer.

If you missed it, watch the What’s New in SAP BTP Q2 2023 edition here.

entry.title: Learn about Localization at SAP TechEd 2023!
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2023 is just around the corner, and we are thrilled to invite you to a series of curated sessions that will delve deep into the fascinating topic of localization. Get ready to expand your knowledge, network with SAP experts, and gain valuable insights into the latest updates for localization.

Check out the list of sessions we have curated for you:

Go Global Confidently with Localized SAP Solutions and SAP BTP (Strategy Talk –  ST103)


Friday, November 03 - 11:00 a.m. - 11:45 a.m. IST


Learn from customer examples how enterprises operate globally through localized SAP solutions and SAP Business Technology Platform, addressing requirements such as security, integration, artificial intelligence, app development, and extensibility. See how companies meet regulatory requirements for e-invoicing, statutory reporting, and business-to-government interactions using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance solution integrated with SAP S/4HANA and go global confidently.



 

Tax Check Automation Using Machine Learning (Mini-Theater Session – AI540)


Friday, November 03 – 03:00 p.m. - 03:45 p.m. IST


Tax checks were required for businesses to extend audit automation to United Kingdom, Australian, and New Zealand markets. Automating tax checks can reduce auditing efforts and enable faster reimbursements. Learn how multimodal transformers use machine learning models that make use of both image and text-based information to identify tax-related information from receipts. You will get insights from SAP experts in data curation, annotation, fine-tuning, and service-deployment pipelines.



 

Empowering SAP Customers to Go Global Confidently - Localization of SAP S/4HANA Cloud


Demo booth - open during the event


SAP customers are empowered to operate globally through SAP’s localized solutions. Stop buy our booth and learn how localization is delivered by SAP including, “localization as a self-service” which provides low-code/no-code extensibility capabilities. Experience real world localization scenarios for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, and SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, SAP’s solution for statutory reporting and electronic invoicing for automated compliance. Get ready for how SAP Localization can propel your business around the world and into the future.



You can find the complete session catalog here.

Do not miss this opportunity to connect and learn more about SAP’s localization offerings.

We are looking forward to meeting you at SAP TechEd 2023!

entry.title: SAP Business Technology Platform In Action
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) use cases consist of customer-proven, well-documented missions for an easy implementation of SAP BTP. They support you in solving problems in a repeatable manner to achieve the desired business outcome faster, whether you’re a business user, architect or developer.

Visit the SAP BTP in Action Community page for implementation guidance and detailed learning material for dedicated SAP BTP use cases, which can assist your company’s implementation journey on SAP BTP.

You will find in this page further information around the SAP BTP use cases at SAP TechEd 2023, implementation guidance, related assets like SAP Garage Webinars, TechEd sessions, free tier services, the BTP trial version, news and blog articles, and more assets to start diving into the universe of SAP BTP.

entry.title: Wonderful, Wonderful SAP BTP! Your Conference Guide to SAPinsider Copenhagen
entry.content:
Immortalised in the lyrics of Danny Kaye’s song, Copenhagen is the city of choice this year for the SAPinsider EMEA 2023 conference, and I’m sure it will prove to be a wonderful location for this eagerly anticipated event.


But just what wonders await you at the conference this year, and what learning and networking opportunities will you find? Well, if your topic of interest is SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) then I am confident that you’ll be pleased with the treasure trove of sessions we’ll be sharing with you this time, as well as the onsite team who’ll be ready to help answer your many questions.

But first, some important news. This year SAPinsider is offering something new. It’s an SAPinsider conference with a difference. And that difference is SAP TechEd Sessions!

As a “companion event” to the SAP TechEd and SAP TechEd Virtual conferences, where SAP BTP product and use-case information will feature prominently, the SAPinsider Innovation and Technology Conference, co-located with SAPinsider EMEA 2023, is offering the opportunity for attendees to continue their SAP TechEd Virtual learning experience by joining this in-person event in Copenhagen. In doing so attendees will have the opportunity to experience deep product sessions as well as speaker networking opportunities, particularly for SAP BTP solutions and technologies, including the sizzling hot topic of AI.

The SAP BTP Copenhagen Top 10!


For followers and fans of SAP BTP, as well those new to BTP, in this now customary pre-event blog I’ve compiled a list of 10 sessions to add to your conference agenda this year, many with an AI-focus, to get you up to speed on the latest developments in SAP BTP. And among these don’t miss the Vestas and Maersk case story sessions:

  1. A Comprehensive Guide for SAP BTP, 10:30 AM, 14 Nov, with Steffen Pietsch

  2. Navigating Your Path to Success with SAP BTP, 1:30 PM, 14 Nov with Nis Boy Naeve

  3. Unleash the Potential of AI to Elevate Your Mobile App Experience, 2:30 PM, 14 Nov, with Mikal Netteberg

  4. Empowering Business Applications through SAP-Enabled AI Integration, 4:00 PM, 14 Nov with Jesper Schleimann

  5. Modernize your landscape and automate business processes with SAP Integration Suite, 10:30 AM, 15 Nov, with Emily Mui

  6. CASE STORY: How SAP Analytics Cloud Supports both flexible and governed BI - Perspectives from an IT Platform Owner, 4:00 PM, 15 Nov with Frederik Platz of Vestas

  7. Utilize SAP Pro Code Tools for Building Faster and More Flexible Solutions, 5:00 PM, 15 Nov with Tim Back

  8. Unlocking the Power of Generative AI: A Path to Business Transformation, 9:00 AM, 16 Nov, with Daniel Stoerkel

  9. CASE STORY: Maersk controls Liquidity using SAC Planning, 10:30 AM, Nov 16, with Girish Gupta and Darren Creffield of Maersk

  10. Unleashing Agility with Cutting-Edge Composable Architecture: Revolutionizing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility, 11:30 AM, 16 Nov, with Felix Wente


In addition, you can choose from over 40 more BTP sessions in a content-rich agenda as well as many for other SAP solutions from SAP, our Customers, and Partners, enabling you to configure your own educational journey across the SAPinsider event. And, as well as this there will be multiple opportunities for you to network with your peers, and a team of SAP and Partner experts who will be delighted to talk with you.

Share Your Own Experience of SAP BTP


Do you already have experience with SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP S/4HANA Cloud or other SAP solutions? If so, visit the SAP exhibit at booth #620 on the show floor and complete a quick and simple 10-minute survey with our friends from TrustRadius. This is an opportunity for you or your colleagues to openly share your thoughts and feedback on your experience with SAP. And, as a thank you for your time, once reviews are published, TrustRadius will provide a $25 USD Amazon gift card via e-mail.

Not attending SAPinsider EMEA 2023 in Copenhagen? No problem! You can still participate and receive the same gift card offer by submitting a product review for SAP BTP or another SAP solution by visiting our SAP Product Review page.

What Next in Copenhagen?


While your conference experience will be full of educational and knowledge sharing opportunities to help expand your horizons of what’s possible with SAP BTP, you’ll surely need to reflect, relax and unwind after those long conference days. So, let’s not forget that you’re also in the wonderful city of Copenhagen, so may I suggest that as well as planning your agenda, that you also plan for some post-conference fun? For some ideas on where to go and what to do in out-of-conference hours in Copenhagen then take a look at this soon to be posted “Alternative Conference Guide” for some locally-inspired ideas of what to do in this amazing city.

So, here’s looking forward to a wonderful, wonderful event in Copenhagen. I shall look forward to seeing you there!

Chris Grundy

(Find me at the SAP booth #620 on the show floor!)

entry.title: Kasimir is back!
entry.content:
Kasimir - the cat, the myth, the badge!
Wanna get your 2023 Kasimir badge? 



Have a look around here in the SAP TechEd Group! For each of the following activities ... 

  • publish a discussion/blog post
  • kudo a discussion/blog post
  • reply to a discussion/blog post
  • kudo a reply to a discussion/blog post

... you will get uploaded our cool Kasimir badge to your SAP Community profile! 

P.S.: Simply commenting on this discussion will earn you the badge!
---------------------------
(Please note, that only activities posted/commented/kudoed since the publication of this discussion count towards receiving the badge. The badges will get uploaded to your profile once/day.)

entry.title: Solving the SAP TechEd Easter Egg on the Web
entry.content:
If you're at SAP TechEd 2023 in Bengaluru, India you may have seen a little Easter Egg in the form of some Node.js code.

If you've seen it and are curious about it, and want to execute it but don't know how, there are plenty of ways you can do it on the Web. You don't need to install Node.js on your machine if you don't want to.

It's important to realise that while Node.js is JavaScript, it comes with more libraries and features relating to the runtime context that it provides. Think of it as "JavaScript++". So you can't run the Easter Egg code in, say, the Chrome Developer Tools console, for example.

But you can run it on the Web. Here are a few places where this is possible:

replit lets you "build software collaboratively with the power of AI, on any device, without spending a second on setup".

CodeSandbox "keeps you in flow by giving you cloud development environments that resume in 1 second".

RunKit "is a node playground in your browser".

And of course, it almost goes without saying that you can run it in a Dev Space in the SAP Business Application Studio.

So what are you waiting for? Stare at the code, try and work out what it's doing, what it emits, and if you get stuck, run it in one of these Web-based environments and see where it leads you. And have fun!

(Originally published on qmacro.org)

entry.title: Heard about SAP Build? Get started now with these videos
entry.content:
Gone to sessions where you learned the latest on SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Process Automation, and now want to get started? Here are 2 new videos for installing SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Process Automation on your SAP BTP trial account.

Install SAP Build Apps

Install SAP Build Process Automation 

And here are some cool tutorials to get started:

  • Build CAP service and use it inside SAP Build Apps (1 hour): https://developers.sap.com/group.build-apps-cap.html
  • Build a more sophisticated app with SAP Build Apps (1.5 hours): https://developers.sap.com/mission.sap-build-apps-social-media.html
  • Build a process in SAP Build Process Automation and connect to it via SAP Build Apps: https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-build-apps-process-trigger.html

The important thing is to get started learning.

_______________________________________

👉 And tell us what else you'd like to learn about

entry.title: And the winners are ... [SAP DemoJam 2023]
entry.content:
We revealed the latest stars of SAP Community back in August when we announced the six finalist teams for SAP DemoJam. Today, six finalist teams showcased their innovative SAP technology–related ideas, solutions, and projects in a live demo format. No slides allowed and only six minutes per team!! Since the six teams were carefully chosen by our panel of judges - we reiterated along the way that all participants were already stars in our eyes. This is one of the reasons why the live audience at SAP TechEd got to choose the overall winning team via the famous APPLAUSE-O-METER!!! 😊 Plus it's so much fun and the audience loves to take part!!

Craig Cmehil had the pleasure of hosting the first DemoJam at SAP TechEd in Bangalore and so was super-excited to host this one also. He invested many hours coaching each finalist team to the point where they felt comfortable and confident to show off their amazing demos in front of a live audience on the main stage at this year's event!!

All that's left to say is, the audience clapped really loudly ...

And the overall winners are …

Syed Ejazuddin
Navin Krishnan Manohar
Demo name: PharmaConnect: Unleashing the Future of Pharmaceutical Integration and Sustainability

 

In second place:
 
Rishi Khandelwal 
Richa Khandelwal
Demo name: SAP + Generative AI: Dawn of a new Technological era 
 
In third place:
 
Adi Mogilevsky
Suhas Sudheendra
Demo name: Use the power of the in-memory HANA Database to measure Radiation

Massive congratulations to the winning team and indeed to all six finalist teams for their utmost dedication, professionalism, time invested and fantastic innovations! Without all of you we could not have had a DemoJam!!

entry.title: SAP Community Series – Introducing our SAP DemoJam Finalists 2023
entry.content:
The SAP Community team bring to you the six finalist team demos for SAP DemoJam 2023! We are delighted to share the innovation with all of you, but especially to those of you who could not attend SAP TechEd Bangalore in person. Let’s recreate some of the amazing moments we had with these courageous and entrepreneurial finalists when on-stage as they now showcase their ideas once more for SAP Community. Six teams, six minutes each, two winning finalists, and zero slides!

By joining one or more of these sessions, you will gain a greater understanding as to why SAP TechEd is the place where ideas get real!

First up is team number one, check out this great event and watch Pavan and Vishnu share their terrific idea with all of you. All session event links will shared below, as they become available.

The series:

Session 1 - watch now!
Title: SAP Analytics Cloud Office Suite
Description: Pavan and Vishnu, the first team to go on stage at SAP DemoJam 2023, showcase their idea to bring SAP Analytics Cloud Office Suite to a new level! An idea any manager would love!
Speaker 1: Pavan Kowshik Santebidanur Nagaraja | Speaker 2: Vishnuvardhan S

Session 2 - watch now and meet the winning team!
Title: PharmaConnekt: Unleashing the Future of Pharmaceutical Integration and Sustainability
Description: Syed and Navin, winners of SAP DemoJam 2023, bring to you their idea of how the future of pharmaceutical integration and sustainability will look.
Speaker 1: Syed Ejazuddin | Speaker 2: Navin Krishnan Manohar

Session 3 - watch now and find out more about this fantastic app!
Title: Healthy Smart Food App: Revolutionizing the Dining Experience
Description: Vikas and Ravi, one of the finalist SAP DemoJam teams in 2023, introduce the Healthy Smart Food Menu App Powered by SAP BTP and AI. Perfect for anyone with food intolerances, allergies, or dislikes!
Speaker 1: Vikas Jangra | Speaker 2: Ravi Kant Ranjan

Session 4 - watch now!
Title: Intelligent Business Interaction Insight Generation in SAP CX using AI/ML
Description: Prateek and Saravana, the fourth team to take to the stage live at SAP DemoJam 2023, bring to you their insights and ideas for SAP CX using AI/ML.
Speaker 1: Prateek Bajaj | Speaker 2: Saravana Kumar

Session 5 - watch now!
Title: SAP + Generative AI
Description: In the eyes of Rishi and Richa - our brother and sister duo, and second-place finalists at SAP DemoJam 2023, this is the dawn of a new technological era, and they are happy to showcase their ideas to SAP Community.
Speaker 1: Rishi Khandelwal | Speaker 2: Richa Khandelwal

Session 6 - watch now!
Title: Use the power of the in-memory SAP HANA Database to measure Radiation
Description: Adi and Suhas, our third-place finalists at SAP DemoJam 2023, share with you their use case for SAP HANA Database and making the world a safer place.
Speaker 1: Adi Mogilevsky | Speaker 2: Suhas Sudheendra

Be sure to check back again for event links as they become available, and – as always – feel free to give a kudo or leave a comment!

entry.title: Don't miss it ! SAP TechEd Japan at Dec 6th 2023. / 登録はお済みですか？
entry.content:
グローバルのSAP TechEdに続き、日本のユーザー・コミュニティメンバーに向けたSAP TechEd Japanが12/6にオンライン開催されます。 ご登録お忘れなく！

日本SAPユーザーとパートナー・エコシステムに向けたオリジナルイベント「SAP TechEd Japan」日本語で最新のSAPテクノロジー情報やプロジェクトに役立つ情報を配信いたします。

イベント情報と登録はこちらから

entry.title: [Replay]: SAP DemoJam 2023 - the Full Live Show!
entry.content:
Didn't get to attend Bangalore November 2023 for SAP TechEd? Don't worry, we are bringing you one of the fun highlights from the end of day one. This year we had six finalist teams that qualified to take part in SAP DemoJam and show off their amazing ideas. Watch as host, Craig Cmehil, brings the stage to life and gets the most out of the participants in terms of energy and enthusiasm. Watch to the very end, the noise-o-meter used for voting brought a really fun and exciting element to the whole event!


Team 1
Title: SAP Analytics Cloud Office Suite
Description: Pavan and Vishnu, the first team to go on stage at SAP DemoJam 2023, showcase their idea to bring SAP Analytics Cloud Office Suite to a new level! An idea any manager would love!
Speaker 1: Pavan Kowshik Santebidanur Nagaraja
Speaker 2: Vishnuvardhan S

Team 2
Title: PharmaConnekt: Unleashing the Future of Pharmaceutical Integration and Sustainability
Description: Syed and Navin, winners of SAP DemoJam 2023, bring to you their idea of how the future of pharmaceutical integration and sustainability will look.
Speaker 1: Syed Ejazuddin
Speaker 2: Navin Krishnan Manohar

Team 3
Title: Healthy Smart Food App: Revolutionizing the Dining Experience
Description: Vikas and Ravi, one of the finalist SAP DemoJam teams in 2023, introduce the Healthy Smart Food Menu App Powered by SAP BTP and AI. Perfect for anyone with food intolerances, allergies, or dislikes! Speaker 1: Vikas Jangra
Speaker 2: Ravi Kant Ranjan

Team 4
Title: Intelligent Business Interaction Insight Generation in SAP CX using AI/ML
Description: Prateek and Saravana, the fourth team to take to the stage live at SAP DemoJam 2023, bring to you their insights and ideas for SAP CX using AI/ML.
Speaker 1: Prateek Bajaj
Speaker 2: Saravana Kumar

Team 5
Title: SAP + Generative AI
Description: In the eyes of Rishi and Richa - our brother and sister duo, and second-place finalists at SAP DemoJam 2023, this is the dawn of a new technological era, and they are happy to showcase their ideas to SAP Community.
Speaker 1: Rishi Khandelwal
Speaker 2: Richa Khandelwal

Team 6
Title: Use the power of the in-memory SAP HANA Database to measure Radiation
Description: Adi and Suhas, our third-place finalists at SAP DemoJam 2023, share with you their use case for SAP HANA Database and making the world a safer place.
Speaker 1: Adi Mogilevsky
Speaker 2: Suhas Sudheendra

Don't forget to give the video a "thumbs up" 😊 and if you haven't already become a member of this SAP TechEd Group - click on "Join Group" at the top.

entry.title: Unlocking Success with SAP: Syed's Inspiring Journey to DemoJam Triumph
entry.content:
Syed couldn't imagine what it would feel like to be on a big stage. He couldn’t image the wild clapping and shouting coming from a crowded room of tech enthusiasts. He couldn't imagine the feeling he would have in his stomach when the six important minutes began – his team’s six important minutes. “I just thought, how can I be so lucky?” Syed was thrilled. He was driven by the excitement of the room – and his own. 

Syed used the SAP Learning site to quickly gain new skills.“It was my first time in a competition”, the 30-year-old from Bangalore recounts. With his colleague Navin, Syed presented their innovative solution addressing a supply chain problem in India: the issue of counterfeit drugs. And they did it on stage the SAP TechEd DemoJam in 2023. Six teams were given six minutes each to present their solution to a problem – live in front of hundreds of people. No mock-ups were allowed, their demo had to be flawless. “My mentor Chandramohan Sankaran, alongside my colleagues such as Kesavan and Vipin, actively contributed to my DemoJam journey. Their diligent efforts and valuable feedback significantly elevated our demo story, pushing it to new heights.” And they secured the first place in the competition.  

Newfound knowledge helped clinch the victory 

However, it didn’t come along that easy, the Senior Product Specialist at SAP Labs Bangalore explains. With only 15 to 20 days to prepare the demo, the duo turned to the SAP Learning site to quickly gain expertise in technologies such as SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Mobile Start, SAP S/4HANA Extension, SAP Adobe Forms, Integration and more. “The knowledge acquired played a pivotal role in delivering the best solution within the tight timeframe, ultimately leading to our success”, Syed says and adds: “I am grateful for the valuable resources provided by SAP, which significantly contributed to our achievements.” 

But Syed’s dedication to staying informed about the latest technologies and innovations does not only define his professional life as a Senior Product Specialist, where he strives to staying at the forefront of SAP advancements and contributing to the development and success of SAP Business Technology Platform. It has also long permeated into his private life as well, where the father of a 3-year-old daughter feels equally excited by cheering when he's in the kitchen. “I enjoy exploring new cuisines and trying out different recipes in my kitchen”, he says, stating that he is a Biryani expert who knows his way around the famous South Indian rice dish. It’s again a testament to his love for continuous learning.  

Broader skillset and industry recognition 

“Learning something new has always brought about significant positive changes in my life”, Syed says. “And acquiring knowledge and skills, particularly through platforms like the SAP Learning site, has enhanced my professional competence. It fostered a mindset of continuous improvement and problem-solving, enabling me to address challenges creatively. It has broadened my skillset and positively influenced various aspects of my professional life, including networking opportunities and industry recognition. In essence, continuous learning has played a pivotal role in my overall growth and success in the dynamic field of SAP technologies.”  

And for those who are still thinking about whether to make their appearance on a big stage and showcase their newfound skills, Syed has a clear message: “If I can do it – you can do it too.” 

Start your own success story   

Did you feel inspired by Syed’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!
